title: Color Contrast Checker
description: Check WCAG 2.1 color contrast ratios for accessibility compliance
viralHook: Is your UI accessible? Check your color contrast in one click

props.title: WCAG Color Contrast Checker
props.description: Enter foreground and background colors to check if they meet WCAG 2.1 accessibility guidelines for contrast ratios.

fields.label: Foreground Color (Hex)
fields.helperText: Text or foreground element color in hex (e.g., #333333)
fields.validationMessage: Enter a valid hex color (e.g., #FF5733 or #F57)

fields.label: Background Color (Hex)
fields.validationMessage: Enter a valid hex color (e.g., #FF5733 or #F57)

fields.label: Preview
fields.description: Visual preview of the foreground text on the background color

fields.label: WCAG AA - Normal Text (4.5:1)
fields.helperText: Minimum 4.5:1 ratio required for normal text (under 18pt / 14pt bold)

fields.label: WCAG AA - Large Text (3:1)
fields.helperText: Minimum 3:1 ratio required for large text (18pt+ or 14pt+ bold)

fields.label: WCAG AAA - Normal Text (7:1)
fields.helperText: Enhanced contrast: 7:1 ratio for normal text

fields.label: WCAG AAA - Large Text (4.5:1)
fields.helperText: Enhanced contrast: 4.5:1 ratio for large text
